deals.desc: Open the Wendy's app to unlock a free Frosty or save $2 on a Breakfast Combo at participating locations.

deals.deal: Free Kids' Entree with Adult Entree (Dine-In)
deals.desc: Kids under 12 eat completely free with the purchase of any full-priced adult entree — valid for dine-in at participating locations.
